combined_text: The CW Announces Return Dates For Arrow, The Flash and More The CW Announces Return Dates For Arrow, The Flash and More By Russ Burlingame - December 9, 20150Ahead of tonight's winter finale for Arrow, The CW has released their official scheduling grid for the Spring 2016 season. That includes the previously-announced premiere date for DC's Legends of Tomorr
